title: Roadmap: content matchers for the scope-only blocking constraints (kill the strict-gate false positives)
context: At firmness=strict, con_2ce3f2a547 (src/synthesis/**) and con_8460b6770f (src/integrations/**) deny EVERY agent edit in scope because they carry no content matcher — invariant-preserving changes get blocked (the dec_e0a36efbf5 false-positive class, hit repeatedly while building the wiki).
decision: Add forbids/match content matchers to both constraints so the gate blocks only edits that actually re-add an API-key path or clobbering write, not every touch in scope.
